title: Mollugo spathulifolia
taxonomy: Mollugo spathulifolia is a species of the genus Mollugo, which belongs to the family Molluginaceae. This family is part of the order Caryophyllales and is a small group of plants that are primarily native to tropical and subtropical regions. The Mollugo genus is further classified within the subfamily Mollugoideae, which is a distinct group within the Molluginaceae family. The classification of Mollugo spathulifolia is consistent with the broader system of plant classification, which organizes organisms into increasingly specific categories based on shared characteristics. The classification of Mollugo spathulifolia is a result of ongoing botanical research and is subject to revision as new information becomes available.
